d: Brutus spins Mountain's Roar at high speed and deals [[110%]]<ATK> damage every second to adjacent enemies for [[4]]s. He is [[unaffected]] while spinning.
Increases damage to [[120%]]<ATK>.
Gains damage immunity when spinning. This skill effect does not affect the duration of other damage immunities granted by his other skills.
Increases damage to [[130%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[140%]]<ATK>.
Brutus roars with rage, taunting surrounding enemies within 2 tiles for [[1.5]]s and reducing their Phys DEF by [[15%]] for [[9]]s.
Reduces surrounding enemies' Phys DEF by [[20%]].
Reduces surrounding enemies' Phys DEF by [[25%]].
Reduces surrounding enemies' Phys DEF by [[30%]].
Brutus is immune to the first [[fatal blow]] he receives. He is then immune to all damage and becomes [[unaffected]] for [[5]]s
Gains [[25]] Life Drain and [[25%]] ATK during immunity.
Gains [[35]] Life Drain and [[30%]] ATK during immunity.
Gains [[35]] Life Drain and [[35%]] ATK during immunity.
Brutus increases his Life Drain by [[10]] during battle. He gains an extra [[5]] Life Drain when casting Whirlwind Wrath.
Brutus increases his Life Drain by [[13]] during battle. He gains an extra [[7]] Life Drain when casting Whirlwind Wrath.
Brutus increases his Life Drain by [[16]] during battle. He gains an extra [[8]] Life Drain when casting Whirlwind Wrath.

Brutus cleaves with all his might to enemies within a 1-tile arc in front after receiving physical damage [[10]] times from adjacent enemies, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage plus [[12%]] of the target's max HP. The total damage cannot exceed [[750%]]<ATK>. Brutus also gains [[30%]] Life Drain. This skill can be triggered once every [[5]]s.
Increases damage to [[230%]]<ATK> plus [[12%]] of the target's max HP (the total damage cannot exceed [[780%]]<ATK>).
Removes the cooldown limit for this skill. Brutus can cast this skill for every [[10]] physical damage attacks he receives from adjacent enemies.
Increases damage to [[260%]]<ATK> plus [[12%]] of the target's max HP (the total damage cannot exceed [[780%]]<ATK>).

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 15 Life Drain, 15 Crit DMG DEF.

d: Brutus increases the duration of damage immunity and [[unaffected]] status from Indomitable by [[1]]s.
